mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log ( user_id, username, login_time, login_ip, login_result, login_type, device_type, fail_reason, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{loginTime}, #{loginIp}, split_part(#{loginResult}, '#', 1), NULLIF(split_part(#{loginResult}, '#', 2), ''), CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(#{userAgent}, '')) LIKE '%mobile%' THEN 'MOBILE' ELSE 'WEB' END, #{failReason}, #{userAgent} )
